name: the-black-girls-guide-to-financial-freedom
description: Paris Woods' guide for Black women — debt elimination, investing, career growth, real estate, and Financial Independence Retire Early (FIRE).
useCase: Getting out of debt, starting to invest, negotiating salary, buying real estate, planning for early retirement.
knownRisks: Financial advice varies by individual circumstances — this is a guide, not personalized advice
FIRE requires high savings rates that may not be achievable for everyone
Some strategies (like house hacking) depend on local real estate markets and may not work everywhere
